Uses of Interface
com.societegenerale.failover.core.store.FailoverStore

Packages that use FailoverStore
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.store
Store abstraction and default in-memory implementation.
com.societegenerale.failover.store.async
 
com.societegenerale.failover.store.caffeine
 
com.societegenerale.failover.store.inmemory
In-memory FailoverStore backend.
com.societegenerale.failover.store.jdbc
 
com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant
Multi-tenant failover store with per-tenant routing.

  • Uses of FailoverStore in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverStore<Object>
    FailoverStoreAutoConfiguration.failoverStore(TenantStoreFactory<Object> storeFactory, FailoverProperties props, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor> taskExecutorProvider, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<TenantResolver> tenantResolverProvider, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher)
    Assembles the single failoverStore bean from the raw TenantStoreFactory and the decorator chain, driven by two properties — see the four modes in the class Javadoc.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverHandler<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverHandler(KeyGenerator keyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy<Object> expiryPolicy, FailoverClock clock, FailoverStore<Object> failoverStore, PayloadEnricher<Object> payloadEnricher, RecoveredPayloadHandler recoveredPayloadHandler, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, PayloadSplitterLookup<Object,Object> payloadSplitterLookup, ContextPropagator contextPropagator, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor> scatterGatherExecutorProvider, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Assembles the full FailoverHandler decorator chain: AdvancedFailoverHandler(ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(DefaultFailoverHandler)).

  • Uses of FailoverStore in com.societegenerale.failover.core.store

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.core.store that implement FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultFailoverStore<T>
    Default FailoverStore decorator that ensures every payload written to or read from the delegate store has its upToDate flag forced to false.

  • Uses of FailoverStore in com.societegenerale.failover.store.async

    Classes in com.societegenerale.failover.store.async that implement FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FailoverStoreAsync<T>
    FailoverStore decorator that offloads write operations (FailoverStoreAsync.store(com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.ReferentialPayload<T>), FailoverStoreAsync.delete(com.societegenerale.failover.core.payload.ReferentialPayload<T>), FailoverStoreAsync.cleanByExpiry(java.time.Instant)) to a TaskExecutor, keeping the calling thread unblocked.
    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.store.async with parameters of type FailoverStore
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    FailoverStoreAsync(FailoverStore<T> failoverStore, org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor executor)
    Creates an async decorator that only logs failures (no metric emission).
     
    FailoverStoreAsync(FailoverStore<T> failoverStore, org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor executor, @Nullable ObservablePublisher observablePublisher)
    Creates an async decorator that additionally reports executor-side failures to the given publisher.

  • Uses of FailoverStore in com.societegenerale.failover.store.caffeine

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FailoverStoreCaffeine<T>
    FailoverStore implementation backed by a single Caffeine in-memory cache.

  • Uses of FailoverStore in com.societegenerale.failover.store.inmemory

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FailoverStoreInmemory<T>
    FailoverStore implementation backed by an in-process map.

  • Uses of FailoverStore in com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MultiTenantFailoverStore<T>
    Outermost FailoverStore decorator that routes every operation to the correct per-tenant store.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.store.multitenant that return FailoverStore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverStore<T>
    TenantStoreFactory.create(String tenantId)
    Creates a raw FailoverStore for the given tenantId.
